promotions.fact: Franchisee Advisory Council exists — advisory only, no operational/decision-making power. Franchisor appoints members and may change/dissolve at any time.
promotions.found_in: reader_report Pass 2 (Brand Fund section) / Item 11 p. 28
promotions.missing_from: canonical — no field for FAC structure
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'franchisee_advisory_council'

promotions.fact: NAEYC accreditation required after 2 years of operation. NAREA membership required. BBB accreditation required.
promotions.found_in: reader_report Pass 2 (Industry memberships) / Item 8 p. 22, Item 11
promotions.missing_from: canonical — no field for required industry certifications/memberships
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'required_certifications'

promotions.fact: Timeline to open: 6–18 months. Franchisor may terminate if not open within 18 months.
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'time_to_open'

promotions.fact: Owner participation: CEO must personally participate 20hrs/week during first year. School Administrator must be on-premises 40hrs/week.
promotions.missing_from: canonical — no structured field for owner participation requirements
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'owner_participation'

promotions.fact: Gross Revenue definition includes business interruption insurance proceeds, excludes refunds, chargebacks, sales taxes, and manufacturer/supplier rebates.
promotions.missing_from: canonical — royalty_rate field exists but Gross Revenue definition components not structured
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'gross_revenue_definition'

promotions.fact: Reporting obligations: Monthly GR statement by 5th, monthly P&L by 5th, annual P&L and balance sheet within 30 days of year-end (cash basis, may require CPA audit), initial investment report within 120 days of opening.
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'reporting_obligations'

promotions.fact: Typical facility: 6,000 sq ft leased space on/near main thoroughfares. Enrollment range 180–250 students.
promotions.missing_from: canonical — no structured field for facility profile
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'facility_profile'

promotions.fact: Former franchisees: 8 entries including mutual terminations (before opening), terminations, and system departures. 3 franchisees ceased communication (Ostroff, Dhukka, Starkey).
promotions.missing_from: canonical — item20 has counts but former franchisee detail not structured
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'former_franchisee_detail'

promotions.fact: Brand Standards Manual: 242 total pages across 6 sections — Preface & Introduction (32), Establishing My Franchise Business (76), Personnel (77), Administrative Procedures (13), Daily Procedures (17), Selling & Marketing (27).
promotions.missing_from: canonical — exhibit referenced but manual structure not broken out
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'operations_manual_structure'

promotions.fact: FA §21.2 establishes no fiduciary relationship and franchisor may act in own self-interest without considering impact on franchisee. No implied covenant of good faith beyond statutory minimum.
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'standard_of_care'

promotions.fact: Damages cap: Franchisee's contract damages limited to refund of franchise fee and royalty fees. 1-year statute of limitations on all franchisee claims. Punitive and consequential damages waived.
promotions.action: promote to canonical under new field 'damages_limitations'

promotions.fact: Renewal terms: FA §4.2 actually provides for a maximum of TWO renewal terms of 10 years each (not one as stated in Item 17 table). However, the initial grant language says 'one renewal', and §4.2 says 'maximum of two renewal terms'. This is a potential contradiction between Item 17 summary and FA §4.2.
promotions.missing_from: canonical states '1 renewal of 10 years' per Item 17 — FA text says 'maximum of two renewal terms'
promotions.action: promote as new contradiction C-02 and update renewal_options
